text: A vacancy on the board shall be filled in the same manner as the original appointment or election.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.103 — Vacancy

A vacancy on the board shall be filled in the same manner as the original appointment or election.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: A vacancy on the board shall be filled in the same manner as the original appointment or election.
